theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Families need a warm, inviting, and calm environment. A purely functional 'tech/SaaS' design feels too clinical for managing home life. The Organic & Earthy archetype, using terracotta and sage, makes the app feel like a beautifully curated home rather than a corporate task manager.
theme_and_archetype.aesthetic_mix: Editorial Magazine (typography, high-end feel) + Handmade Pottery (colors, warmth, tactile softness) + Architectural Drafting (clarity in task organization).

font_rules: No Inter or generic sans for headings.
Headings (Cormorant Garamond) must use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines and tags must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.

rules: Never use pure black or pure white outside of defined surfaces.
Use #F7F5F0 (Warm Sand) as the primary base background for light mode.
Do not use generic blue or teal.
Category colors: Care (Ochre), Home (Terracotta), Health (Sage), Admin (Muted Brown/Gray), Spese (Soft Blue-Gray).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard p-1 to p-32. Use generous spacing (p-6, p-8) for cards to provide breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.container_rules: Max-width wrapper for desktop, but primarily designed as mobile PWA (100w for mobile).
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for cards. Buttons use rounded-full for a friendly, approachable tactile feel.
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Fixed bottom tab bar for mobile PWA with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F7F5F0]/80).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-surface_muted text-text_primary rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-border transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-text_secondary hover:text-primary rounded-full px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-surface border border-border rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm
cards.interactive: bg-surface border border-border rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-primary/20 transition-all cursor-pointer

bottom_navigation.container: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-20 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-border flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-safe z-50
bottom_navigation.item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-16 gap-1 text-text_secondary

inputs.default: bg-surface border border-border rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-base text-text_primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary placeholder:text-text_secondary/50

login.layout: Hero image background overlaid with solid content container at the bottom.

onboarding_hub.content: Create family, add first task, see demo.

home_bacheca.layout: Top: Weekly Summary Card (AI). Below: List of today's tasks.
home_bacheca.task_card: Minimalist row: Checkbox circle (left), Title & Category badge (middle), Assignee avatar (right).

home_agenda.layout: Horizontal date scroll at top. Vertical timeline below for events.

home_famiglia.layout: Grid of family member cards (rounded-3xl). Each card shows avatar, name, role, and upcoming birthday.

home_spese.layout: Top summary card (Total Month). Below: list of expenses with progress bar split by user.

home_profilo.layout: List of settings items: Theme toggle, Language select, Notifications, Family Management.

ai_family_assistant.trigger: Floating Action Button (FAB) positioned bottom-right (above nav bar), featuring the ai_assistant_icon.
ai_family_assistant.ui: Bottom sheet modal (Drawer) that slides up. Conversational interface (chat bubbles).
ai_family_assistant.vibe: Friendly, casual, using emojis naturally. 'Ciao! Cosa organizziamo oggi?'

weekly_summary.ui: Distinctive card with a soft gradient background (from sage to terracotta, low opacity 10%). Features a small spark/AI icon.
weekly_summary.content: Auto-generated Sunday evening text e.g., 'Ottimo lavoro! Questa settimana avete completato 14 task. Non dimenticate il compleanno di Marco martedì!'

smart_task_input.ui: As user types 'Comprare il latte', a small animated badge pops up inside or below the input: '✨ Suggerimento: Categoria -> Casa | Scadenza -> Oggi'. User taps to accept.

gift_ideas.location: Famiglia tab -> Click on member -> Birthday section.
gift_ideas.ui: A button '✨ Idee Regalo AI'. Opens a modal with 3 visually distinct cards showing generated gift ideas based on the member's profile.

images.description: Warm tactile abstract background, handmade pottery textures
images.usage: Background for the Login screen. Use object-cover and a dark/light gradient overlay so login forms remain readable.

images.description: Beautifully organized wooden table top view, eucalyptus, ceramic cup
images.usage: Hero image at the top of the Onboarding Hub screen.

images.description: Cute minimalist abstract ceramic sculpture in sage green
images.usage: Use as the avatar/icon for the Floating AI Assistant.

icons.usage: Use solid/filled variants for active tabs, outline variants for inactive tabs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply data-testid to ALL interactive elements using kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='tab-bacheca').
Use Shadcn UI for the complex components (Dialog for Gift Ideas, Drawer for AI Assistant, Tabs for filtering tasks, Calendar for Agenda).
Configure Tailwind CSS to include the color variables defined in the color_system. Use CSS variables in index.css so light/dark mode toggles easily.
Do not use generic border styles for cards; ensure border is 1px solid using the specified border colors (#E5E1D8).

The App must have a mobile-first PWA feel: hide the desktop navigation and strictly use the bottom tab bar. On desktop, constrain the main layout to max-w-md or max-w-lg and center it on the screen to mimic a mobile device context.
Language is Italian by default. Use Italian copy as specified in the problem statement.
Apply fonts globally in index.css: body { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; } h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; }
CRITICAL: Create these React .js components inside frontend/src/components/. Ensure you use .js extensions, not .tsx!
